mainEntity.name: What evidence needed prove work accident Sandy Utah?
mainEntity.text: What evidence needed prove work accident Sandy Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Incident report witnesses medical records surveillance video.[21]

suggestedAnswer.text: Sandy claims fail without contemporaneous proof; photos timestamps bolster. Insurers investigate discredit—secure evidence fast. Vocational reports for long-term impact.[21]
